## Motivation

- Why is this change needed?
- What user-facing or operational problem does it solve?

## Behavior Changes

- Summarize the runtime behavior changes.
- Call out any changed heuristics or assumptions.

## Compatibility Notes

- List any changes to response shapes, trace payloads, or `factsStage.facts`.
- If there are no compatibility concerns, say so explicitly.

## Tests

- List the focused tests you added or updated.
- Note any manual verification that was performed.
